feature.name: Timer
feature.description: A timer that counts down from a given number of minutes to zero. The background should go from green to a light yellow as the timer ticks down. This feature should include a time entry field, a start button, and a pause and reset button. The total time should be split in half between "skills time", and "target practice". skills time should be broken up into 5 minute intervals. Target practice will be the remaining time.

examples.example: given 60 minutes - skills time would be 30 minutes broken into 6 separate 5 minute chunks, and target practice will be 30 minutes.
given 45 minutes - skills time would be 15 minutes broken into 3 separate 5 minute chunks, and target practice will be 20 minutes.

feature.name: Song Entry
feature.description: The user should be able to create two lists of items. This will be "Skills Pieces" and "Target Pieces". Skills will be things like etudes, arpegios, scales, or instrument specific exercises. One of these will be displayed randomly during the skills portion of the timer. Targets will be things like Seitz Concerto no. 3. These lists should come with a default set of examples. The user should be able to add or remove pieces from either list, and these should remain persistent between sessions.

feature.name: Cross-device syncing
feature.description: This feature should be behind a paywall as part of a freemium model. Users should be able to log in and sync their skill and song list on multiple devices.

feature.name: Analytics
feature.description: This feature should be behind a paywall as part of a freemium model. Users should be able to view analytics on their practice time. Practice streaks, time spent per skill/piece, personalized recommendations based on least played skills and favored time of day.

feature.name: Streaks and reminders
feature.description: The app should include streaks and reminders to play if the user has not in a few days.

feature.name: Saved timers and intervals
feature.description: This feature should be behind a paywall as part of a freemium model. Users should be able to save multiple configurations for timers and intervals.

feature.name: AI suggested practice plans
feature.description: Premium users get AI-driven suggestions based on their history (e.g., "Try this etude next for your weak areas") or auto-generated weekly plans. Could integrate with goals like "Prepare for recital in 3 months."

feature.name: Custom Themes
feature.description: Free users should get basic styling. Premium users get access to more themes and customization options for sounds.

feature.name: Ads
feature.description: Ads for free users and ad-free experience for premium users.

stack: React native TypeScript with expo framework, firebase analytics. iOS and Android compatible.
input: Using the default react native project build a modern styled Practice timer app that includes the features described above. MVP will be the basic timer and song lists then we can add features from there.

issues.issue: time remaining and countdown aren't clear. Make the current time the larger timer and have it count down. Make the remaining time smaller under a label that says "total time" and have it count up with a note of the full time shown in this format "current time / total time"
Current piece (skill or target) should be larger.
need to carry theme and styling through to the skills entry page.
When timer ends it should display a list of all songs played and have a larger reset button.
with only one digit the textinput field will not allow backspace. should clear to the default value.
